name: Hello Kitty® and Friends SLIMYGLOOP Gelli Gels – Kuromi™, Slow Rising Sensory Squeeze Toy with Glitter, Gel Filled Fidget Toys
bullets: SLOW-FLOW GLITTER: This purple Kuromi-shaped Gelli Gel is filled with mesmerizing slow-flow glitter that makes every squeeze more satisfying than a regular stress ball or classic fidget toy.
NEVER LOSES ITS SHAPE: Its shape-memory design means it magically bounces back into its iconic Kuromi shape no matter how much you stretch and squish!
DURABLE AND LONG-LASTING: This purple squishy is built for endless sensory play without losing its shape or sparkle!
SQUISH IT ANYWHERE: From the school bus to your work desk, this purple Gelli Gel is perfect for quick moments of focus or fidget fun for Sanrio fans of all ages.
COLLECT THEM ALL: Make it a complete set when you add Hello Kitty and Cinnamoroll to your collection!
description: Meet your new favorite fidget toy, the Hello Kitty® And Friends SLIMYGLOOP Gelli Gels – Kuromi™! Filled with a mesmerizing, slow-flow glitter gel that’s super satisfying to squeeze, stretch, and twist, this purple Gelli Gel is the glow-up your stress ball never knew it needed. Pull it, squish it, flatten it, and watch as it magically forms back into Kuromi again and again! Perfect for sensory play or focus breaks at school, work, or home, this pocket-sized fidget is endlessly fun for kids, teens, and adults. It’s the coolest way to unwind — Kuromi style. Suitable for ages 4 and up.

reviews.name: nurselauren83
reviews.title: Durable, Odor-Free and Great Value
reviews.body: This is a great-quality squishy at an excellent price! It’s soft and satisfying to squeeze, yet durable enough to hold up to frequent use without ripping or tearing. Another big plus is that it doesn’t have the strong chemical odor that many squishies do. Overall, it’s well-made, long-lasting and a great value for the money.

reviews.name: Elizabeth Melton
reviews.title: 13 year old approves!!!!
reviews.body: This was a God send! During this season where every child from 5-18 want NEEDOHS, and if you can find real ones they are OUTRAGEOUS in price; being able to satiate my child’s desires for a “squishy” that was cute, felt good and didn’t absolutely KILL my wallet I was beyond impressed! HIGHLY RECOMMENDED

reviews.name: Justin
reviews.title: Awesome squish
reviews.body: Had a faint scent but when away when we washed it. Love the sugar texture and how thick and durable it feels.

reviews.name: Amy Kasper
reviews.title: Nice squeeze
reviews.body: It’s a good squish. My daughter likes it.
